name: sets-expansion
description: A planned `sets: N` shorthand expands to N atomic WorkUnits during normalization, with `sets` removed and deterministic ids (§5.5, §8.3 steps 5-6).
expectedNote: Normalizes to 4 flat records: ex-1 (Exercise), and 3 WorkUnits. The 1st expanded WorkUnit keeps the source id `wu-1` at array position 1; the 2nd and 3rd are id-less and receive `ex-1#workUnits#2` and `ex-1#workUnits#3` (1-based position in the parent's post-sets-expansion `workUnits` array, §8.3 step 6). Each expanded WorkUnit: `sets` removed; `reps` expanded to {absolute:{value:5}}; carries `partOf: ex-1`; `subject` propagated as subj-001. Order-independent comparison as a set of canonical records.
